title: 1st Gen - Prototype
description: generation: 1; subtype: 原型药物; year_range: 1995; key_features: 首个ARB，AT1选择性较低，半衰期短(2h)，活性代谢物E3174(6-9h)，surmountable拮抗

title: 2nd Gen - Structural Diversification
description: generation: 2; subtype: 结构多样化; year_range: 1996-1998; key_features: 改善药代(PK/PD)，部分为非竞争性拮抗(insurmountable)，半衰期延长

title: 3rd Gen - High-Affinity Prodrugs
description: generation: 3; subtype: 高亲和前药; year_range: 2002-至今; key_features: 更高AT1亲和力(insurmountable)，前药设计提高口服生物利用度

title: BCB (溴甲基氰基联苯)
description: chinese: 4'-溴甲基-2-氰基联苯; full_name: 4'-Bromomethyl-2-cyanobiphenyl; cas: 114772-53-1; role: 通用关键中间体; formula: C14H10BrN; mw: 272.14; desc: ARB类药物核心砌块，与咪唑/苯并咪唑缩合后经四氮唑化得联苯四氮唑母核; synthesis_from: 2-氰基-4'-甲基联苯 → NBS溴代 → BCB

title: BPT (联苯四氮唑)
description: chinese: 联苯四氮唑中间体; full_name: 5-(4'-Bromomethylbiphenyl-2-yl)-1H-tetrazole; cas: 133051-88-4; role: 四氮唑化中间体; formula: C14H11BrN4; mw: 315.17; desc: BCB经NaN3/ZnCl2环合→四氮唑，再与咪唑/苯并咪唑缩合构建ARB母核; synthesis_from: BCB + NaN3/ZnCl2 → [3+2]环加成 → BPT

title: Trityl-BPT
description: chinese: 三苯甲基保护联苯四氮唑; full_name: N-Trityl-5-(4'-bromomethylbiphenyl-2-yl)tetrazole; role: 选择性N2保护中间体; desc: BPT经TrCl保护四氮唑N2位，确保后续烷基化反应在N1位进行; synthesis_from: BPT + TrCl/Et3N → Trityl-BPT

title: Valsartan Aldehyde Intermediate
description: chinese: 缬沙坦醛中间体; full_name: N-[(2'-Cyano-[1,1'-biphenyl]-4-yl)methyl]-N-valeryl-L-valine; role: 缬沙坦关键中间体; desc: BCB与L-缬氨酸苄酯缩合→酰化→氢化脱苄→缬沙坦醛中间体

title: Telmisartan Benzimidazole Core
description: chinese: 替米沙坦苯并咪唑母核; full_name: 2-n-Propyl-4-methyl-6-(1-methylbenzimidazol-2-yl)benzimidazole; formula: C19H18N4; mw: 302.37; role: 替米沙坦母核中间体; desc: 邻苯二胺衍生物缩合环化→苯并咪唑母核，再与BPT缩合得替米沙坦

title: Trityl Chloride (TrCl)
description: chinese: 三苯基氯甲烷; cas: 76-83-5; role: 四氮唑N2保护基; used_in: ['Candesartan Cilexetil', 'Olmesartan Medoxomil', 'Azilsartan Medoxomil']; desc: 选择性保护四氮唑N2位，确保N1烷基化区域选择性

title: Medoxomil Chloride
description: chinese: 美多酯氯; full_name: 4-Chloromethyl-5-methyl-1,3-dioxol-2-one; role: 前药酯化试剂; used_in: ['Olmesartan Medoxomil', 'Azilsartan Medoxomil']; desc: 与ARB羧酸成酯→前药形式，提高口服生物利用度

title: Cilexetil (环己氧羰氧乙基)
description: chinese: 环己氧羰氧乙基; full_name: 1-[[(Cyclohexyloxy)carbonyl]oxy]ethyl; role: 前药酯化试剂; used_in: ['Candesartan Cilexetil']; desc: 与坎地沙坦羧酸成酯→坎地沙坦酯前药，口服后酯酶水解活化

title: Sodium Azide / ZnCl2
description: chinese: 叠氮化钠/氯化锌; role: 四氮唑环化试剂; used_in: ['All BPT synthesis']; desc: 与氰基发生[3+2]环加成→四氮唑环（Click反应前驱）

title: Losartan
description: chinese: 氯沙坦; year: 1995; cas: 114798-26-4; formula: C22H23ClN6O; mw: 422.91; cid: 3961; desc: 首个上市的ARB(Cozaar)，咪唑联苯四氮唑母核，活性代谢物EXP3174; source: BCB→四氮唑→咪唑烷基化→氯沙坦

title: Valsartan
description: chinese: 缬沙坦; year: 1996; cas: 137862-53-4; formula: C24H29N5O3; mw: 435.52; cid: 60846; desc: 非杂环ARB(Diovan)，酰化缬氨酸替代咪唑环，全球销量最高ARB; source: BCB+L-缬氨酸→缩合→四氮唑化→缬沙坦

title: Irbesartan
description: chinese: 厄贝沙坦; year: 1997; cas: 138402-11-6; formula: C25H28N6O; mw: 428.53; cid: 3749; desc: 咪唑啉酮环ARB(Avapro)，长效T1/2=11-15h，insurmountable拮抗; source: BCB→四氮唑→咪唑啉酮环构建→厄贝沙坦

title: Candesartan Cilexetil
description: chinese: 坎地沙坦酯; year: 1997; cas: 145040-37-5; formula: C33H34N6O6; mw: 610.66; cid: 2540; desc: 苯并咪唑ARB前药(Atacand)，insurmountable拮抗，长效T1/2=9h; source: BCB→四氮唑→三苯甲基保护→苯并咪唑缩合→脱保护→酯化→坎地沙坦酯

title: Telmisartan
description: chinese: 替米沙坦; year: 1998; cas: 144701-48-4; formula: C33H30N4O2; mw: 514.62; cid: 65999; desc: 双苯并咪唑ARB(Micardis)，最长T1/2≈24h，PPARγ部分激动活性; source: 苯并咪唑母核+BPT缩合→替米沙坦

title: Eprosartan
description: chinese: 依普沙坦; year: 1998; cas: 133040-01-4; formula: C23H24N2O4S; mw: 424.52; cid: 5281037; desc: 非联苯非四氮唑ARB(Teveten)，噻吩丙烯酸母核，双通道排泄; source: 噻吩甲醛+丙二酸→Knoevenagel→侧链缩合→依普沙坦

title: Olmesartan Medoxomil
description: chinese: 奥美沙坦酯; year: 2002; cas: 144689-63-4; formula: C29H30N6O6; mw: 558.59; cid: 130881; desc: 咪唑ARB前药(Benicar)，最高AT1亲和力之一，medoxomil前药酯化; source: BCB→四氮唑→三苯甲基保护→咪唑缩合→脱保护→Medoxomil酯化

title: Azilsartan Medoxomil
description: chinese: 阿齐沙坦酯; year: 2011; cas: 863031-21-4; formula: C30H24N4O8; mw: 568.53; cid: 11238867; desc: 噁二唑酮ARB前药(Edarbi)，对AT1亲和力极高，长效降压; source: BCB→噁二唑酮环构建→Medoxomil酯化→阿齐沙坦酯

title: Fimasartan
description: chinese: 非马沙坦; year: 2010; cas: 247257-48-3; formula: C26H31N7OS; mw: 489.64; cid: 9870652; desc: 嘧啶酮ARB(Kanarb，韩国首个自研ARB)，快速起效(1h达峰); source: 嘧啶酮母核+联苯四氮唑侧链偶联→非马沙坦
